name: Pork Chops Golden Glow
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly brown pork chops on both sides in a large skillet or slow-cooking pot, using the browning setting.
2. Pour off excess fat from the pan.
3. In a bowl, combine brown sugar, cinnamon, cloves, tomato sauce, 1/4 cup syrup from peaches, and vinegar.
4. Sprinkle pork chops with salt and pepper.
5. Arrange the seasoned pork chops in the slow-cooking pot.
6. Place the drained peach halves on top of the pork chops.
7. Pour the tomato mixture over all.
8. Cover and cook on low for 4 to 6 hours.
Makes 5 to 6 servings.
